Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Oh wow, I didn't think we'd emerge here instead of the Desert of Doors...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}But I guess it's not completely improbable since this place seems to be fully connected to the Abyss of Time now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Maybe it was influenced by everyone thinking of making frequent supply trips.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}In any case, this will certainly make it easier to go back and forth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Helloooooo! Yo, li'l sis, what's with the holdup?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Hey, keep it moving! The rest of us need to get through, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Though we secured a means[n]to acquire supplies, we remain[n]trapped in the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
